Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for car damage, while he countersues for destruction of his personal property; a landlord hopes to recoup money for damages and unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love and Legal Damage

Video.summary: A man claims a car repair shop damaged his car; a woman claims her cat was attacked by her neighbor's dog.
Video.title: Claws vs Paws

Video.summary: The owner of a dog who was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died is now left with veterinary bills and emotionally distraught; a woman accuses her ex-boyfriend of stealing her debit card while she was incarcerated.
Video.title: All Dogs Go to Court

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: McKenzie is suing her baby's father for the price of a car because he chooses work and football over family.
Video.title: Football Over Family

Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: An unruly puppy and Darius' girlfriend's panty problem has Darius issuing his girlfriend, Ife, an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wilson vs. Graham

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: A mother sues her daughter for an unpaid furniture loan; two friends are in court over $600.
Video.title: Chairing the Burden

Video.summary: A salon client sues a stylist, who says she did as she was told; litigants feud over whether their cars collided.
Video.title: Not So Stylish

Video.summary: Andre and Niemah battle in court for parental custody of a beloved pet, Bella.
Video.title: Porch vs. Gillis

Video.summary: Tandrea sues her ex-girlfriend, Chantay, for $1,000 in pet fees that she failed to pay when they moved into an apartment together.
Video.title: Davis vs. Goodman

Video.summary: Hannah claims her roommate Monica smashed her belongings by throwing them off a balcony, suing for $680. Monica denies this, countering that Hannah stole and donated her things, filing a $1,000 countersuit.
Video.title: Roommates Rumble

Video.summary: Olivia is suing her best friend's daughter over a utility bill but Kalia wants nothing to do with her.
Video.title: Someone’s Full of Hot Air

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Devout religion and a party lifestyle collide in Texas couple Lamonte and Leola's relationship.
Video.title: Hawley vs. Gibson

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: A sports betting addiction brings Erica and her boyfriend to court.
Video.title: East vs. Conner

Video.summary: Steven and Luz Spitzer hired photographer Frank Calabro for their wedding, but chaos ensued when a guest’s camera sparked a fight. Frank withheld the photos, citing a contract breach.
Video.title: Wedding Wrecker

Video.summary: Bruce Pouncy claims his landlord, Beatrice Smith, forced him out and kept his $1,200 deposit after he suggested a new roommate. Beatrice says Bruce left the apartment a mess, removed the oven door, and didn’t pay rent.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Raoul Lopez sues ex Jessica Melendy for $5,000, claiming she stole his car and refuses to return it. Jessica argues he gave it to her willingly and countersues for $4,299.03, citing expenses during their relationship.
Video.title: Exes Clash Over a Car

Video.summary: Russell King claims Rasheeda Brown owes him $3,000 for painting her house, despite doing an excellent job. Rasheeda argues he brought his son to work with heavy machinery, acted inappropriately, and left the job incomplete.
Video.title: Painting Disaster

Video.summary: Peter Persaud sues his sister-in-law Sharon Chee for $824.59, claiming she owes him for household items he bought for her apartment. Sharon argues she already paid for some items, rejected the bed, and isn't liable for unwanted items.
Video.title: Suing a Sister-in-Law

Video.summary: Anthony claims he saw explicit text messages between the defendant and her ex, so he sues for unpaid loans.
Video.title: Raunchy Texts and Explicit Agreements

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: A mom says a crooked landlord is overcharging and taking advantage of her while she searches for a home for her disabled daughter; a tax refund goes missing, and the plaintiff says her ex-girlfriend is responsible.
Video.title: Lease of Faith

Video.summary: First a daughter sues her mother for unpaid bills and lost wages. Then plaintiff sues for property damage.
Video.title: Grand Theft Shoe Box

Video.summary: First man sues ex for a nose job he claims he subsidized. Then woman claims ex stole her car after breakup.
Video.title: Bowling for Dupes

Video.summary: Dwayne says he just wants to see his kids and that Lisa is using them to punish him for their split.
Video.title: Nose for a Nose

Video.summary: First plaintiff claims defendant stole her puppy. Then plaintiff alleges that her ex abused her.
Video.title: In Need of Repair

Video.summary: First bridesmaid allegedly steals engagement ring. Then a couple sues for payments and damages to their car.
Video.title: All in the Family

Video.summary: First plaintiff sues for unpaid rent and property damage. Then a plaintiff sues ex-boyfriend.
Video.title: A Story of Repossession

Video.summary: First daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle. Then two sisters dispute car payments.
Video.title: Resisting Restitution

Video.summary: Heather invited newly single Richard to live with her. She says he owes her 3 months rent for cheating on her.
Video.title: i-Fraud

Video.summary: First sisters dispute over a cell phone. Then man sues neighbor for allegedly destroying his chainsaw.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: First woman sues for the fraudulent iPhone sale. Then plaintiff is suing the defendant for a down payment!
Video.title: Unsullied and Unpaid

Video.summary: First a dispute over car damages. Then two friends attempt to sue the plaintiff for $1500!
Video.title: Broken Bonds

Video.summary: Two years after a fast split Marc wants his TV back from Shelly's. He said he left it there temporarily.
Video.title: Oh, Brother
